n0._value: Beautiful day today!

n1._value: Press left Alt key and  you'll be able to jump.

n2._value: Press the arrow keys to move around here and there.

s0._value: Ha!

d0._value: You must be a new traveler. I will give you some instructions, which will be very useful. If you want to speak with us, you can simply click on us. You can move by pressing #bleft, right key#k and jump. Come on, try it! Also, sometimes you may need to climb a ladder or use a rope to reach your destination. You can do that by pressing #bup arrow#k. This is important, so remember it well.

d1._value: Now I can take a look at my face with this mirror. Phew~~ I'm still alright.

n0._value: It's a neverending pile of laundry I'll be hanging around here.

n1._value: Have you met my sister Heena before?

n2._value: Just press the up arrow, and you can climb the ladder or rope.

n3._value: Click on us to start a chat!

a0._value: Why isn't Heena helping me hang all this laundry?

s0._value: You must be on you first journey, am I right?

i0._value: What should I make for dinner...?

l0._value: Oh my gosh, my laundry! still left to do...

h0._value: Haven't washed my hair in days...and...

d0._value: It is a fine day to do the laundry~ Don't you think so?

d1._value: Did you give my mirror to #g#p1##k? When will she help me to do this...

n0._value: Open your item inventory and you'll find equip., use, set-up, etc. and cash tabs.

n1._value: The item you pick up is automatically stored in an appropriate item category. What do you think? Isn't it cool?

n2._value: Double-click on an item in the item inventory and you'll be able to use it.

f0._value: You want to discard an item? Then click on an item in the inventory, and drag it out of the window.

f1._value: If your item inventory is full, you won't be able to take in new items. You should take care of the unimportant ones by either discarding them or selling them at a store.

f2._value: Use items can also be stored on the bottom right tray where you can assign HotKey's...

w0._value: You'll die once your HP reaches 0, so it's for your own good to take a potion or food before it's too late.

w1._value: You want to travel now? Then come talk to me...

w2._value: If you want to talk to someone, double-click on them

d0._value: Hey, nice weather, isn't it?

d1._value: Did it help you a lot? Farewell my dear Mapler!

n0._value: What would be good for dinner?

s0._value: I'm cute, right?

d0._value: What is #b#p5##k doing, now?...

d1._value: I will make a mushroom soup for #p5#. Is there a fresh mushroom?

n0._value: I'm... so ... hungry!

n1._value: Can... I... eat this ...?

d0._value: There is nothing to eat in here~ oh...

d1._value: What did my sister say? oh~ I am so hungry...

n0._value: You should train yourself well before going on the journey.

n1._value: Well done getting here!

n2._value: This is the exit to the Mushroom Town.

f0._value: If you want to move on to the next stage, talk to me.

f1._value: Be careful...once you leave this place, you'll see monsters roaming around.

w0._value: So you're ready for the adventure?

w1._value: Now it's all up to you to train yourself. Good luck!

w2._value: We instructors are all related. Roger, my older brother, and Robin, my younger brother, all work together here.

h1._value: So what's my relationship with Roger? Hahaha...he's my older brother!

d0._value: Are you having a pleasant journey so far?

d1._value: Go and enjoy the adventures that await!

n0._value: Watch out for the monsters

n1._value: You can attack the monsters, if you press "Ctrl".

n2._value: You can pick up the items, if you press "z".

n3._value: If the monsters are strong, how about making a party with other players?

f0._value: You should attack the monsters with the right timing

f1._value: That was Mushroom Town. There are Amherst and Southperry in this Island.

w0._value: If you go there, you might see Robin.

d0._value: If you don't know where to go, I will let you know.

d1._value: So... did you see #p8#?

n0._value: Be careful! You'll see monsters around here.

n1._value: Press 'Ctrl' to attack the monster.

n2._value: Press Z and you'll be able to pick up the item the monster drops.

n3._value: If it's a powerful monster, how about teaming up with someone else?

f0._value: You need to time the attack right to take down the monsters easily.

f1._value: The town you just saw is called Mushroom Town. You'll also find places called Southperry and Amherst on this island.

f2._value: If you want to head over to a bigger, wider area, try heading up northeast.

w0._value: You met up with my brothers Roger and Peter before, right?

d0._value: Hello! I'm #p8#.

d1._value: Gathering information before starting your travels is essential for an enjoyable experience.

n0._value: You can be even stronger, if you get a lesson from Mai.

n1._value: Go to the right and then you can meet bunch of other people.

n2._value: Press "w" to see the current position.

n3._value: How about partying with other players?

f0._value: You should attack the monsters with the right timing.

f1._value: You would see lot of new things if you go to Amherst.

w0._value: Even if you don't know the way, just go~

d0._value: Huh? My name is #p9#...

d1._value: So you did see #p11# huh?

n0._value: Ahh...I need to get this letter sent...

l0._value: Whoa, time's going fast...it may be too late...

d0._value: I should bring this to #m1010#... What should I do... hmm...

d1._value: Now I can deliver important news to the town. Thanks a lot. Are you using the hat, I gave you? How is that? Pretty good, huh?

n0._value: Do you know me by any chance? You don't? What's wrong with you?

n1._value: If you are thinking of challenging me, I suggest you keep dreaming...

n2._value: Is there anyone that can satisfy my desire to fight...?

d0._value: You can be much stronger, if you get to be trained by me. Come to me, whenever you are ready.

d1._value: How about going to the world out there?

n0._value: Hmm...looks like I'm still the best looking man in this town.

n1._value: Hey you! What are you looking at! If you're admiring at my good looks, might as well say it!!

n2._value: One of these days, I'll be the one operating that huge ship, and take off to a far bigger land...

d0._value: I can't stay in this town forever. Is there anyone who can help me?

d1._value: Thanks for the last time. Now, if I get just little more money, I probably can start the business. Are you still using the weapon, which I gave you?

n0._value: Whoa, what are you looking at?!?!

d0._value: When will I be able to explore the bigger world outside the Maple World?

d1._value: Even if it is Orange Mushroom, not Red Snail, It doesn't bother me a bit.  I have been training with #p11# for a long time!  Oh, this is a secret just between you and me!

n0._value: Working hard there~

s0._value: Salute~

d0._value: I am good at making anything!  Since my uncle is #p18# in #m1010#, he used to teach me lots of things when I was young.

d1._value: It might be only few tree branches but it will be a big help when gathered.  It could build a boat that sails over the sea.

n0._value: I am the captain, dang it!! Don't be looking down on me!

n1._value: I'll take you anywhere you want

n0._value: Let's see...I'm ready to make some money...

n1._value: Hello everyone! I've got some goods here for sale!!

n2._value: Anyone that steals will not go unpunished!!

n0._value: Stranger...what are you doing here?

n1._value: I'm not too fond of the strangers. I'm only worried about the peace of this town.

n2._value: You...if you're strong and powerful, can you take care of the monsters around town?

d0._value: A letter from #r#p10##k should be here, any minute. Is there something wrong? Hmm...

d1._value: You safely delivered my reply to #r#p10##k? Thanks~ so #r#p10##k gave you a present? Haha... She is one of the best for making a hat....

n0._value: Do you need my help by any chance? I can handle machinery really well...

n1._value: I just ate a little bit ago...and yet I'm hungry already...!!

n2._value: Phew...work is hard. I need to take a break.

d0._value: Hmmm... I guess these things must be very useful in some places...

d1._value:
Ah~~~ You are the one who collected stuff for me. You will get to have a job, soon. Oh, you didn't know that?
 If you get to the lv. 10, you can be a magician, bowman, warrior and thief. You cannot do those in this Island, so take a ship from the #m60# and go to the Victoria Island.

n0._value: Isn't it nice out here today?

n1._value: To jump, press the left Alt key.

n2._value: Press the arrow keys to move around here and there.

s0._value: Ha~!

d0._value: Ready to try the maple Quiz?

d1._value: Right~! You are the one who solved all the quiz. Anyway, How are you?

n0._value: On sale! Really CHEAP!

n1._value: Welcome!! Hahahaha!

n0._value: Ok, cheap goods! Really cheap!!

n1._value: Hey you!! Don't even think about stealing in here...

n2._value: You definitely need potions to travel

n0._value: How about buying one of these fishes?

n1._value: I used to be an adventurer myself...but now I don't mind living a normal life...

n2._value: You don't need to be that scared of it. I've walked away from that lifestyle long ago.

d0._value: Is there anyone who can help me? Well... I would like to go by myself, but as you can see, I have lots of stuff to do...

d1._value: You are the one, who brought the flower to me. Again, thanks a lot.. Feel free to stay in this town.

n0._value: Open your item inventory and you'll find equip., use, set-up, and etc. and cash tabs.

n0._value: Hey, have you seen a whale around here? Hmmm... where did it go ...

n1._value: Haven't been able to shave in months ... now my chin is starting to itch like crazy

n2._value: The incredible feeling of sailing along the beautiful coast ... that's what life is all about!

d0._value: I heard that #p207# is sick again. Sad...

d1._value: Oh~ So it seems that you have delievered #b#t4031009##k to #p207#...! Thanks. Now #p207# can get better now. huh? #t4031011# It is still very beautiful~

n0._value: I wanna travel too...

n1._value: Why does my dad not want me to travel around?

s0._value: Am I cute?

d0._value: My dream is to travel all over the world.... Just like you... But my father just doesn't let me...

d1._value: So It is you. Thanks for the materials you get. If you need something, please let me know.

n0._value: You need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!

n1._value: My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!

n0._value: Who am I? Well...who AM I?

n1._value: If you have a secret scroll by any chance, would you mind showing that to me?

d0._value: What are you here fore? Are you here because of my ravishing good looks?

d1._value: If you're done with me, then I suggest you leave soon. I'm a very busy person...

n0._value: Huh? Hey you come here!

n1._value: Look at me~ Do you want to be strong like me?

d0._value: Look at me~ Do you want to be strong like me?

d1._value: Now it's time for you to decide which of the four occupations you're willing to choose.

s0._value: You know that it is about time to choose your job!

s1._value: What? Strong Warrior? Dances with Barlog will help you~

s2._value: If you want to become a bowman, go and meet Athena Pierce in Henesys.

s3._value: If you choose to become a magician, go and meet Grendel the Really Old in Ellinia.

s4._value: You want to be a thief like Dark Lord? You know where to go~

n0._value: Let's see...I'm ready to start doing some business here...

n1._value: Welcome everyone! I've got some goods you will definitely be interested in...!

n2._value: Anyone that steals will feel my wrath!!!

n0._value: Low price! Really loooow!

n1._value: Whoa there, no stealing around here!!!

n2._value: It's a must that you get some potions if you want to go on a journey.

n0._value: On Sale!! Crazy Prices!!!

n1._value: Come check it out!! Hahahahah!

n0._value: Hey, there! Is your buddy list full by any chance?

n1._value: If you need to expand your buddy list, how about doing some business with me? Harharhar...

n0._value: Do you want to head over to Florina Beach?

n1._value: There's a gorgeous beach called Florina Beach near Victoria Island...

n0._value: Have you met up with Athena Pierce, the one that watches over and takes care of our town?

n1._value: If you want to become a bowman, please go see Athena Pierce, who resides in the inner part of the park.

n2._value: Hmm...is Ronnie doing well? I can't find him...I was thinking of fixing him a nice plate of Unagi.

d0._value: This town is made by the group of bowmen. If you want to become a bowman, please meet with #r#p221##k... She will help you. What? You don't know #r#p221##k? She saved our town long time ago from the monsters. Of course, it is safe now. She is the hero of our town.

d1._value: Oh... You're the one who gave the stuff back? So what's up? Is #p218# doing fine? If you go to #m10001050# someday, please say hello to #p218# for me.

n0._value: Where did my son go...

n1._value: Hey, you! I strongly suggest you don't do anything stupid around this town...

d0._value: My Son...! That ungrateful kid... He just didn't listen to me and ran out. I can never ever forgive him...! He can never come to this town again...!

d1._value: Did you give the gold watch to #p402#? I feel so lonely without him... Anyway, can you please tell him that I will forgive him and he can come home now.

s0._value: With my food, I can definitely win the trophy in the festival.

s1._value: Hmmm... Now... I need more ingredients...

s2._value: It will be great... I guarantee you...

d0._value: We are lacking man power. We should get some help from the people who came from other places...

d1._value: Thanks for doing that. Now we can prepare for the festival.

s0._value: Today is Utah's birthday... I should give a birthday present to him...

s1._value: I don't really like angry ribbon pigs.

s2._value: Utah may get really disappointed if I don't get him the presents.

d0._value: Hey there, I'm #p204#...

d1._value: Ah, you're the one that helped me out the other day. Thank you so much for that time!

s0._value: I need to take great care of the Maple History Book. It contains lots of important information, you know!

s1._value: I really hope Henesys stays peaceful. I grew up here!

d0._value: I really love it here, and my goal is to make Henesys an even better place to live.

d1._value: You're the one that helped me recover the history book. Your good deeds will be remembered for generations to come!

s0._value: Sometimes you can find amazing things, if you study monsters.

s1._value: I am a scholar who studies animals and monsters

d0._value: My name is #p206#.

d1._value: You are the one who helped me on the other day. How are you?

n0._value: Cough, cough...

d0._value: Cough... Cough... Ah... Headache... Can somebody help me?...

d1._value: Thanks for the last time. Now I feel much better. Thanks for everything.

n0._value: You need something?

d0._value: I’m the carpenter of this town. Woodworking is well developed here in #m10001000#.

d1._value: Oh? If it isn’t my apprentice, #h0#. Are you putting your woodworking skills to good use?

n0._value: Pet food for your precious pet!! On Sale!!

n1._value: Do you need to get some food for your pet?

n0._value: Really cheap around here!!!

n1._value: Come check it out! Ahahahah!!

n0._value: Hmm...I'm ready for business now...

n1._value: Ahem, I only deal with the finest of all items...

n0._value: Yawn, I'm tired... just go choose an item you want ...
Do you want to have plastic surgery? Let me take care of you then...

n1._value: It's not a bad idea to change your face up every once in a while

n0._value: I've been wearing these for so long, I can barely see what's in front of me now...

n1._value: Ah ... you want a plastic surgery? Cough cough ...

n2._value: Plastic surgery ... allow me to handle it ... haha ... by the way, where is the face ... ?

n0._value: You like my hairstyle? We hairdressers are supposed to keep up with the latest trends, you know?

n1._value: Are you tired of your hairdo? Here, let me make it look nice and pretty for you...

n0._value: I'm Brittany the assistant, in charge of dying hair...

n1._value: Natalie is my mother and the owner of this place.

n0._value: These days, everyone wants to tan their skin...

n1._value: There's nothing as healthy-looking as a well-tanned skin. What do you think? Do you want to tan it like me?

n2._value: Every once in a while, someone comes along that wants a clean, white skin. That's ok, too.

n0._value: I wanna do something...

n1._value: Ahhhh...it's trying to eat me!!

n2._value: Ahh...I like it...sooo comfortable...

d0._value: Ah~! It is really getting to me!!! #o16#... Oh... Are you a stranger?

d1._value: Thanks for the last time. Now #o16# is about to extinct. So how was the scroll?

n0._value: Do you have any questions about pets? Ask me anything about them...

n1._value: Are you raising a pet? If you have any questions, feel free to ask

n0._value: You need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!

n1._value: My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!

n0._value: Do you want to become a bowman?

d0._value: Those who want to become a bowman... Please come...

d1._value: Those who want to become a bowman... Please come...

n0._value: What? Your pet turned into a doll? Of course... it's originally a doll that came to life through a special magic.

n1._value: Hehehe ... if you need to train your pet, I'll take care of it...

n0._value: Hmmm ... my brother keeps making me do these dumb assignments ...

n1._value: Taking a walk around town with your pet...isn't that the best feeling in the world??

n0._value: When's Mom coming? She must be busy...

n1._value: I can only do this by myself for so long...

d0._value: I'm #p224#, the daughter of Dr. Betty.

d1._value: Hey, you wanna hang out with me?

s0._value: What should I do after feeding the pigs?

s1._value: Today is my birthday... Probably something good will happen to me

s2._value: Hmm... I should talk to Camilla after feeding the pigs...

d0._value: Hi. Welcome to my farm.

d1._value: I should rush back to Camila. You can exit the farm, if you take left here.

n0._value: zzz...

n2._value: This is the way to the ... dun ... geon ... zzzzzzzz ....

d0._value: Okay, who just woke me up?? I hate anyone that wakes me up from my nap ... huh? What am I doing? What do you think I'm doing? Of course I'm guarding the entrance!! This is the entrance to the #bVictoria Island : Center Dungeon#k. You have to be careful in there; the monsters you've faced don't even compare to the ones you're about to face in here. I suggest you don't go in there unless you can protect yourself. Okay, nap time!

d1._value: Hey, it's you! Am I falling asleep again? Well, I was actually called out the other day for doing that, so I've been trying NOT to these days. It's dangerous around here, so please be careful.

n0._value: Do you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the bowman? Go see "Athena Pierce" of Henesys first.

n1._value: Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the bowman.

d0._value: What’s going on?

n0._value: You tired of hunting? How about playing a minigame?

n1._value: Still no one to beat me...I'm the master of minigames...

n0._value: It's not easy to make a new sauce.

n1._value: No, this is not it! I need a distinctive flavor.

d0._value: I'm Estelle, and I love to cook!

d1._value: Did you like the sauce I made the other day? Did it help you on your cooking?

n0._value: Do you need anything...?

n1._value: Here...I have some goods here, so come take a look at them!

d0._value: Ever wondered who creates the fairies’ beautiful garments? Heh… that would be me, the tailor of this village.

d1._value: Oh? If it isn’t my first human apprentice, #h0#. So—how is life as a tailor treating you?

n0._value: Ah... my precious collection ... where are they???

n1._value: I don't want to ask humans for a favor ... but ... there's no choice.

d0._value: I lost a very important item ...

d1._value: You're the one that recovered the glass shoes from the menacing #o3210100# the other day. Thank you so much, and if you need my help, feel free to come talk to me.

n0._value: Do you think my friend Ronnie is doing well...?

n1._value: Deep in the forest, Zombie Lupin's are threatening the safety of our town ...

n2._value: A few days ago, my friend Arwen lost her red heart-shaped earrings in the middle of the forrest owned by Shane ...

d0._value: Do you need me for something? Please don't bother me unless you need me right this minute.

d1._value: It's you, my savior. #o4230101# hasn't been attacking our town ever since you helped us out the other day. How are you doing these days?

n0._value: Are you here at the request of Sabitrama?

n1._value: I heard there's an incredible herb that can be found in here...but I can't just let you easily like that...

d0._value: Do you want to enter this place? I'm sure you've heard of the fact that there are some rare herbs in here, but I can't let some stranger like you enter my property. I'm sorry, but you'll have to leave.

d1._value: Do you want to enter this place? I'm sure you've heard of the fact that there are some rare herbs in here, but I can't let some stranger like you enter my property. I'm sorry, but you'll have to leave.

n2._value: Not everyone can enter this place~

n0._value: You need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!

n1._value: My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!

s0._value: Lots of work, not enough help...

n0._value: Hey, if you got some time, can you help me out here?

d0._value: I'm Betty the biologist. There are so many things to work on, but I'm always lacking time.

d1._value: Thank you so much for your help! Couldn't have come at a better time!

n1._value: So much homework ... and so much studying to do ... man I'm swamped ...

d0._value: I've got a lot of work to do!

d1._value: I'd appreciate it if you don't bother me for now.

n0._value: Welcome to Ellinia~

n1._value: I have many good available here. Come check them out!

n0._value: We sell various kinds of armors here...

n1._value: Come take a look.

n0._value: Do you need potions by any chance? I have plenty in store...

n1._value: If you want to return to Ellinia at will, then try buying the return scroll to this place.

n0._value: To all that desire to become a magician...talk to me...

d0._value: To all that desire to become a magician...talk to me...

d1._value: To all that desire to become a magician...talk to me...

n0._value: If you want to leave this place, come talk to me.

d0._value: In the midst of the pile of flowers, I can feel some strange aura in there. Unfortunately, I feel something strange around the flowers and I don't think I can take them with me.

d1._value: In the midst of the pile of flowers, I can feel some strange aura in there. Unfortunately, I feel something strange around the flowers and I don't think I can take them with me.

n0._value: Did your pet turned back into a doll by any chance?

n1._value: If you have an unmoving pet with you, please take it to me.

n0._value: I can make scrolls easily!

n1._value: I know exactly what kind of scrolls you want.

n0._value: Do you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the magician? Go see "Grendel the Really Old" of Ellinia first.

n1._value: Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the magician.

d0._value: What’s going on?

n0._value: I... actually snuck out with my dad's book.

n1._value: I'm still a kid so I don't know much... but what exactly is in this book?

d0._value: Now what exactly is in this book that makes my dad take care of it so much? I want to know what's inside, but I don't think I'll understand it one bit...

d1._value: You got him the book, right? I still don't think he even cares about me. I should just go back to the fairy town and stay there.

n0._value: Hmm... can I see you for a sec ...?

n1._value: Hmm ... the items you may need ... I have them all.

d0._value: What do I do for a living? Heh. Believe it or not, I’m a leatherworking master people actually know around these streets. Judging by that look on your face… you don’t buy it, huh? Tch.

d1._value: Heh heh… so? Are the skills I taught you actually useful, or what?

n0._value: Ah... I'm bored...

d0._value: It's been months since I ran away from home, and frankly I'm sick of wandering around strange places now. But I feel weird about going back home...

d1._value: Thanks for the help the other day. I'd love to go back home, but I have to at least say my goodbyes to everyone that helped me out here. These people will actually miss me, you know ...

n0._value: Oh no... where could it be ...??

n1._value: Crap~~!! I lost my money!!!!

n2._value: I hope someone can help me out ...

d0._value: Oh my gosh ... I lost the coin that my friend lent me ... I can't find it!!

d1._value: You're the one that helped me out three times!!!! I can't thank you enough for getting me out of trouble. I mean, you helped me out three times!! I've been much more careful these days. Isn't that an improvement or what?

n0._value: Hey...are you logged on at Internet Cafe? Then come in...

n1._value: It's an Internet Cafe right here, but not everyone can go in...

n0._value: You need a place to store your items and mesos? Here it is!

n1._value: My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!

n0._value: Man, I'm soooo busy! Anyone around here willing to help?

n1._value: Strangers walking around everywhere here today.

d0._value: I got so many requests from the townspeople today! I need help here...

d1._value: Aren't you the one that helped me take care of #b#p408##k's request? He should be at home fixing himself a hearty dinner right about now. Unfortunately, I haven't gotten any new requests today. Come talk to me some other time, alright?

d0._value: Look... the sky...

d1._value: Someday... Someday... I will fly...

n0._value: You need a weapon? Our store specializes in weapons for thieves...

n1._value: Alright! Pick and choose!

n0._value: Hello there, do you need something?

n1._value: There is no way in the world you're going to overpay for an item here~

n1._value: Here! Pick and choose!!

d1._value: To those that want to be a thief, come...

s0._value: I need to get these bandages off, but where'd Dr. Niora??

s1._value: Something's not right ... hey you ... you know of anything?

d0._value: It's...so...cold

d1._value: Well ... where should I go now ...? What do I do now?

n0._value: Hey, you! You seem to be having a bad-hair day...how about letting me take care of it??

n1._value: Hahahah! Welcome to my hair salon! Have a seat!

n0._value: Oh no no no no no~~!! YOU need a haircut!!

n1._value: I may not be as good as the Don, but I'm close enough~

n0._value: Do you have a raw ore of a mineral or a jewel by any chance? Allow me to do the rest for you...

n1._value: Phew ... I'm tired. I'll rest up a little bit for now.

n0._value: If you need any scrolls, come talk to me.

n1._value: It's a piece of cake for me to make scrolls, you know.

n0._value: Do you want in? Then please purchase a ticket here.

n1._value: No one is allowed in without a ticket.

n0._value: Do you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the thief? Go see "Dark Lord" of Kerning City first.

n1._value: Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the thief.

d0._value: What’s going on?

n0._value: Haven't seen you before...better be careful around here.

n1._value: Don't worry, we aren't cannibals here...*gulp*

n2._value: Don't you like my hair? It's very popular around town.

d0._value: Our family grew, and I'll have to fix the house to make it bigger, but I need materials to do so...

d1._value: Hey, it's you! Thanks to you, the building of the house for my cousins are well on their way. You should come check it out when it's completed.

n1._value: Don't talk to me.

n2._value: Leave now...or you'll get hurt.

d0._value: Anyone who dares to stand in my path will be punished dearly...

d1._value: Hah... I was wondering who's bothering me, and it's you. Alright, I won't call you a nobody anymore...

n0._value: There is nothing in this world that I can't make...hahah!

n1._value: Do you have a jewel or a mineral by any chance? Show me then!

d0._value: That rascal #p504#… Hard to believe that scrawny apprentice of mine has grown into a full-fledged blacksmith. Makes me proud… though I can’t help feeling a little lonely, haha!

d1._value: Well, well… if it isn’t my apprentice, #h0#. You’ve been polishing those weaponcrafting skills I taught you, right?

n0._value: I'm Mr. Thunder's apprentice.

n1._value: If you need something made, just come find me.

d0._value: I may not look like it, but I’m a well-known master blacksmith here in #m10004000#.

d1._value: Oh… if it isn’t my apprentice, #h0#. You’ve been keeping up with the smithing techniques I taught you, right?

n0._value: You need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!

n1._value: My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!

s0._value: My name is Ayan. Nice to meet you~

s1._value: I have been living in this town ever since I was rescued by the people here.

d0._value: Hi~

d1._value: You are the one who helped me the other day. Thank you~

n0._value: Cheap~! Sooo cheap!!

n1._value: Come check it out!! Hahahah

n0._value: Let's see...I'm ready for some work here!

n1._value: Hello everyone! I've got some fiiine goods for ya!

n2._value: I will never let go of the thieves trying to steal things here.

n0._value: I made this potion myself!!

n1._value: Hey, you! No stealing around here...

n0._value: Ok...I'm ready to do business...

n1._value: It's so boring around here...

n2._value: Is Maya getting better from her sickness?

s0._value: Not a bad day at work today!

s1._value: Please don't bargain with me too much~

s2._value: Don't they look good today? I put great effort to today's stock

h1._value: Please don't try to bargain with me too much~

h2._value: Isn't it just gorgeous out here today?

d0._value: Man, I want to travel around and stuff. I don't want to be stuck here working. This stinks!! I'm stuck here making potions everyday thanks to my mom opening up a convenience store. This is definitely NOT fun.

d1._value: What did you do with #b#t4031011##k? That's a coveted rock and all, but it requires so many items to make that you're the first one to actually gather them all up! Anyway, hope this is put to good use.

n0._value: Do you want to become a warrior?

n1._value: For those that want to become a warrior, come see me...

d0._value: For those that want to become a warrior, come see me...

d1._value: For those that want to become a warrior, come see me...

s0._value: The fossils contain important information from the past.

s1._value: Do you think I can ... recover all that data that I've lost?

n0._value: Look around the cliff and you may be able to find the fossils.

d0._value: I'm Winston the archeologist.

d1._value: You're the one that helped me out the other day. Unfortunately I'm really busy right this minute. I'll talk to you later.

n0._value: zzz...

n2._value: This is the way to the...dun...geon...zz.zzzzzz....

d0._value: I found this old document the other day and it had something about this mythical item. #b#t4021009##k and #b#t4003002##k seem like items that have something to do with the fairies at Ellinia. Maybe #t4001005# has to do with the Golems that the old mages made. #b#t4001006##k reminds me of a flaming dragon...

d1._value: I found this old document the other day and it had something about this mythical item. #b#t4021009##k and #b#t4003002##k seem like items that have something to do with the fairies at Ellinia. n1._value: Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the warrior.

d0._value: What’s going on?

n0._value: You need something...?

d0._value: It's been years and years since Sabitrama and I first came to this place. Yet we still have not discovered the truth...

d1._value: It's been years and years since Sabitrama and I first came to this place. Yet we still have not discovered the truth...

n0._value: I'm collecting herbs...

d0._value: Lots of medicinal herbs in this forest. Nothing makes me happier than finding new herbs here!

d1._value: It's you!! Thanks to the herbs you got me, the medicine is well on its way. It should be done pretty soon. Thanks again for your help.

n0._value: You need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!

n1._value: My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!

s0._value: With a few materials, you can make summoning rocks and magic rocks

d0._value: Hello there. I'm Eurek the Alchemist, wandering around places all over the world of MapleStory. I'm here just to stop by for a bit.

n0._value: Hello. Welcome to Sleepywood Hotel

n1._value: Please use our hotel if you want to regain your health.

a0._value: Ahh... as usual, a lot of work to do today.

s0._value: How's traveling?

i0._value: What kind of people are coming today...

h0._value: My hair isn't messed up by any chance ... right?

n0._value: A few minutes in sauna, and you'll feel much better. What do you think? Already working for you?

n1._value: If you need an item, I have some available, so go take a look...

n0._value: Ah... you're using the VIP sauna. What do you think? Do you want to make a deal with me?

d0._value: Welcome to the VIP sauna of the #m105040300# Hotel. Actually I need some help here ...

d1._value: I'm so glad I got this book back safely. It's my number one treasure, you know. Am I not worried about #p1061004#? The fairies are taking care of him alright, so I'm not worried one bit.

d0._value: (A strange statue. You can't tell whether it is laughing or crying.)

d1._value: (A strange statue. You can't tell whether it is laughing or crying.)

n0._value: We have everything except the ones we don't have~

n1._value: Alright, everyone come check it out!

s0._value: If you plan to head deeper into the cave, you’ll need to be well prepared.

s1._value: Shops like this are rare in these forgotten caves. Would you like to take a look?

s2._value: The deeper parts of the cave have all decayed, and you can no longer find their former beauty. It’s truly a sad thing.

s3._value: To have a human guest… how unexpected.

s4._value: Whether human or fairy, a precious guest is still a precious guest.

s0._value: Luma worries way too much. One time, I tried to visit my old home deeper in the cave, and she completely blew up at me!

s1._value: The truth is, I used to live much farther inside the cave, but now… I can’t go back there anymore.

s2._value: Oh wow!? A human, this deep in the cave… What brings you here?

s3._value: I’d love to explore outside the cave, but Luma would probably nag me for a week.

d0._value: A very long time ago something truly unfortunate happened. Because of it, we had no choice but to leave the home we once knew...

d1._value: #p700# always tells us to be wary of humans. I should let her know that there are trustworthy humans—like you!

s0._value: A few years ago, a man wearing a straw hat and carrying a large sword came here. I wonder how he’s doing now.

s1._value: Here’s a bit of advice—don’t even think about going deeper into the cave, alright?!

s2._value: There was a time when this place was bustling with cave fairies, but now only a few remain…

s3._value: The fairies of Ellinia tell me to leave this place, but I just can’t.

d0._value: Someone as strong as you might be able to venture deeper into the caverns...

d1._value: We fairies all used to live together long ago, but after that sorrowful event many of us left and moved to Ellinia.

s0._value: My friends… they have all changed…

s1._value: The World Tree… must be protected…

s2._value: Human… you must not… go any farther…

d0._value: At this rate... the island will be in danger...

d1._value: He has changed... Arcon has changed... It is a sorrowful thing...

s0._value: Forgotten Hollow… an ideal site for Arcforge research.

s1._value: Hehehe… I pulled another all-nighter on Arcforge yesterday.

n0._value: Here you go! Delicious food fresh and homemade!

n1._value: On a hot day like this, Ice with Red-Beans is the way to go!

n0._value: This is Florina Beach!

n1._value: If you want to head back to where you were before, feel free to talk to me.

n1._value: Aren't we hot?

n1._value: I don't want to ask humans for a favor... but... there's no choice.
